author: SantiMod
content:
@here  Join the legendary Town Hall Afterparty! 

Friday fun & alpha with our Metaverse Host Ash and the team - a perfect opportunity to ask & learn about Star Atlas with the community!

 Starting at 1.20 PST (9.20 UTC) in Twitter Spaces - JOIN IN:
https://twitter.com/i/spaces/1ynJOZPBaXqGR

 You can also listen to it here in the ⁠🎤┃Atlas Amphitheater
